title: I'm getting good setup suggestions from AI
author: No_Jicama5917

comments.author: InterestingYam9472
comments.body: How u get this ai indicator?

replies.author: No_Jicama5917
replies.body: You can get it on chrome web store, it's called TradeVision AI

replies.author: sideh0316
replies.body: How does it work exactly? Can you give us some tips?

replies.author: No_Jicama5917
replies.body: You can just download it and there are the setup instructions, it's very easy and completely free to use [https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/tradevision-ai-tradingvie/okicdidofnbggiiohdnplgakdijlehlg](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/tradevision-ai-tradingvie/okicdidofnbggiiohdnplgakdijlehlg)

comments.author: HisCloudRig
comments.body:
Mine says bullish

Ai is shit

replies.author: No_Jicama5917
replies.body: Just got stop hunted on this trade unfortunately🥲 But i made some wins on other setup AI suggested. I think the prompt need some refinements

replies.author: FloxonAI
replies.body: AI is meant to give you insight and not tell you what to do.

replies.author: No_Jicama5917
replies.body: Stop hunted then price went exactly in the direction :( I just set the stop to near
